name: Loadout Editor
description: Build and manage spawn loadout JSON files with a visual equipment editor, tree view, multi-file tabs, and full import/export support.

tutorialSteps.title: 🎒 Templates & Files
tutorialSteps.description: Pick a template (Military, Civilian, etc.) to create a full loadout instantly, or import existing .json files.

tutorialSteps.title: 👤 Equipment: Gear Slots
tutorialSteps.description: The left sidebar lists all survivor gear slots. Click a slot to see its equipped items.

tutorialSteps.title: 👤 Equipment: Character View
tutorialSteps.description: The center panel shows a survivor silhouette. Dotted circles represent gear slots — click to select.

tutorialSteps.title: 📋 Equipment: Item Properties
tutorialSteps.description: The right panel shows details for the selected slot's items — ClassName, Chance, Quantity, Health, Attachments, Cargo, and Sets.

tutorialSteps.title: 🌳 Tree: Hierarchy View
tutorialSteps.description: The Tree view shows the full loadout hierarchy. Right-click for context menu with add, duplicate, and delete options.

tutorialSteps.title: 🌳 Tree: Node Properties
tutorialSteps.description: Click any item node in the tree to open its property panel on the right. Use Ctrl+C/V to copy/paste items.

tutorialSteps.title: 🔍 Diagnostics & Export
tutorialSteps.description: The diagnostics dropdown lists validation issues. Use the export button to download your loadout as JSON or ZIP.
